ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address for the order */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order (excluding shipping) */,
  "total_shipping_price" REAL /* Total shipping cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the order is being processed */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the order */,
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping method used for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order (e.g., Paid, Unpaid, Refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_method_id") REFERENCES shipping_methods ("shipping_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "shipping_price" REAL /* Shipping cost for the product */,
  "shipping_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the shipping (e.g., Low, Medium, High, VIP) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the specific item */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date for the specific item */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the specific item (e.g., In Stock, Out of Stock, Backordered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "loyalty_level" TEXT /* Loyalty level of the customer (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold) */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer across all orders */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders placed by the customer */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* Preferred payment method of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the address belongs to */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., Shipping, Billing) */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code or postal code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the address is the default shipping or billing address */,
  "address_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or instructions for the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., 10x10x10 cm) */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Time it takes to restock the product after it reaches the reorder level */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity that can be ordered for the product */,
  "max_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity that can be ordered for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (to support hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed upon with the supplier (e.g., Net 30, Net 60) */,
  "supplier_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the supplier based on performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the warehouse */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_utilization" INTEGER /* Current utilization of the warehouse capacity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product in the warehouse */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product in the warehouse */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date of the last stock update */,
  "last_received_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last received in the warehouse */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Time it takes to restock the product after it reaches the reorder level (specific to the warehouse) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_methods" (
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping method */,
  "base_cost" REAL /* Base cost of the shipping method */,
  "additional_cost_per_weight" REAL /* Additional cost per unit of weight */,
  "expected_delivery_days" INTEGER /* Expected number of days for delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status_change_date" TEXT /* Date of the status change */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the order */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the order */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the status change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments related to the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
